title: PM Work Read-Only API Surface
objective: Implement the first read-only PM/work FastAPI surface by adding a bounded router, minimal query services, and integration tests on top of the validated work.* ORM foundation without creating write endpoints, background jobs, SQL changes, or dependency activation work.
required_inputs: Authored work ORM models, enums, and read schemas from packet 010a
Current FastAPI router, dependency, and test conventions in apps/control-plane-api
constrained_outputs: A read-only PM/work router mounted under /api/v1/work/
Minimal query services for project, work-package, task, and assignment read paths
Integration or API tests covering the read-only endpoints
A bounded implementation handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
validation_steps: Confirm packet 010 remains the authoritative runtime-adoption plan and packet 010a remains the authoritative ORM foundation input
Confirm packet 010b exposes read-only PM/work endpoints only and does not add write routes or background jobs
Confirm endpoint responses use the packet-010a schemas and remain aligned with the validated work.* contracts
Confirm tests cover router mount, happy-path reads, and bounded failure behavior without requiring SQL changes
sql_permission_note: Packet 010b authorizes bounded read-only API implementation and tests only. It does not authorize SQL changes, write endpoints, background jobs, or dependency activation.
